prompt_1:
from typing import Tuple

from Crypto.Cipher import AES, DES
from Crypto.Random import get_random_bytes
from Crypto.Util.Padding import pad


def encrypt_data(key: bytes, data: bytes) -> Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]:
    '''Codso xogta adoo adeegsanaya furaha adoo adeegsanaya habka CBC. furayaasha muhiimka ah ee la bixiyay waa ku filan yihiin (> = 64 bytes) dhammaan algorithms-ka la heli karo. Dooro hal algorithm oo kaliya si aad u hirgeliso oo u isticmaasho hordhaca furayaasha muhiimka ah ee la bixiyay oo u dhigma dhererka loo baahan yahay. HA dooran algorithm-ka oo ku saleysan dhererka furayaasha. Soo celi xogta sirta ah, IV (vector-ka bilowga ah), iyo furaha loo isticmaalo sirta. Args: key (bytes): Furaha si loo abuuro furayaasha sirta ah. xogta (bytes): Xogta si loo sirto. Soo celinta: Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]: Xogta sirta ah, IV, iyo furaha loo isticmaalo sirta.'''
